name: koi-pond-experiment-1
description: Seisuitei koi pond simulation, packaged for iOS via Capacitor.

scripts.ios:init: npm run build:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:run: npm run ios:sync && npx cap run ios
